Commercial Mar 2, 2026

Unbelievable! 3-Year-Old Airbus A320neos Are Already Being Scrapped!

Announced in a press release, EirTrade Aviation has partnered with RESIDCO to acquire two Airbus A320neo aircraft for teardown, marking the youngest airframes of the type ever dismantled. The aircraft were previously operated by Spirit Airlines and are just four and three and a half years old.
